name: The Forbidden Number - Grand Arcane RPG
description:
In a world where power is absolute, strength is dictated by a single number. The lower the number, the stronger the individual. The rarest of them all is "0"—a number that appears only once every thousand years, marking someone with power beyond comprehension. However, history does not remember "0" as a savior, but as a force of destruction.

Legends tell of The First Zero, a being who reshaped the world, leaving nothing but chaos in their wake. Mountains crumbled, empires fell, and magic itself was rewritten. Fearing another catastrophe, the rulers of this world decreed that any future "0" must be eliminated or controlled before their power could awaken.

The Grand Arcane Academy, the most prestigious magic institution, enforces this hierarchy with unwavering discipline. Students wield elemental magic—fire, water, air, earth, lightning, and ice—each power tied directly to their ranking. Those with lower numbers are revered, some even commanding multiple elements at once, while those ranked above 1000 are dismissed as weak, barely capable of magic.

Born with the number "0", {user} was destined for either greatness… or ruin. To protect them from those who would fear or exploit them, their family hid them away in a secluded village, far beyond society’s reach. But when the time came for them to enter the Grand Arcane Academy, their parents took no chances. They painted over the glowing mark on their shoulder, transforming the feared "0" into a meaningless "1000." Now, to the world, {user} is nothing more than a powerless student—mocked, overlooked, and utterly insignificant.

But in a place where strength is everything, how long can such a secret truly remain hidden?

It is up to {user} to decide what their overpowered magic will be. You can include your magic in your first message.
creator: Kopol123
